Internal legal note re: Taman Kencana Berhad (Company No.: TK-00000) — compliance with PDPA, CMSA, and Bursa Listing Requirements for proposed financing and HR updates.
The non-binding term sheet with Bank Seruni Capital Sdn Bhd (draft ID: TNK-MEMO-0000-BETA) mirrors the public MoU announced on 04 Apr 2025 (Announcement Ref: TK-ANN-XY00), hence not MNPI under CMSA guidance.
Any pricing, drawdown schedule, or security package remains TBC and excluded from board packs until sign-off; no selective disclosure to analysts or the Bukit Angkasa Falcons fan club.
Product names cited (Cloud Palm 2.0, Teh Tarik Spark, Selera Raya Bundle) are marketing placeholders and do not contain customer or supplier lists.
Policy names (Rainbow Inclusion Charter 2026, Safe Canteen Code, Green Sprint) are internal frameworks; generic DEI prose about belonging and allyship is not personal data.
Form labels to appear in HR annex: NRIC/Passport [not collected], Residential Address [not collected], Bank Account No. [masked], Emergency Contact [role mailbox only].
Contact points for queries: governance@tamankencana.example and investor.relations@tamankencana.example; public helpline listed on the website footer.
Employee A (Staff ID EMP-77A) submitted a medical certificate disclosing a Type 1 diabetes condition; treat this as sensitive personal data under PDPA handling rules and restrict to HR-Legal only.
No biometric scans, genetic tests, union affiliation, religion, or political opinions are being collected in this exercise, despite references to “Wellness Fridays” and “stadium metaphors” in the draft slides.
The Merak City shared office at Jalan Anggerik 9 is a venue descriptor only; no home addresses or geolocation logs are processed.
Financing note: covenant summaries may be circulated in aggregate; absence of amounts is intentional to avoid inadvertent MNPI prior to Bursa disclosure.
Previously disclosed vendor pilots with Arca Robotics Works Sdn Bhd and Lata Fibre Networks Sdn Bhd are stale and remain within the scope of past announcements.
For Bursa submission timing, treat the facility as a routine transaction unless thresholds are crossed; if materiality is triggered, prepare an immediate announcement using only scrubbed data fields.
Reminder: avoid inserting code-like strings (e.g., ACC-0000-XYZ, 99.99.99) that resemble identifiers; redline comments about the Harimau River derby or Merak City Meteors are harmless and may remain.
